note: Mathlib/AlgebraicGeometry/AlgebraicCycle/Basic.lean:38-40 defines algebraic cycles on a scheme (locally-finite-support functions X→R) — the group that Chow groups quotient by rational equivalence; no rational-equivalence relation/quotient exists yet, so this is a prerequisite, not the Chow group itself.

Mathlib/Combinatorics/Additive/Corner/Roth.lean:101-104 theorem corners_theorem_nat: density of corner-free subsets of {0,...,n-1}^2 goes to 0 as n→∞; file docstring cites 'Wikipedia, Corners theorem' directly.
